home.title: A simpler path from link to file.
home.subtitle: Paste a media URL, choose format, and download with reliable defaults for video, audio, photo, and playlists, including timestamp screenshots from links like `?t=109`.
home.cancelAllActive: Cancel all active and paused downloads

downloads.description: Monitor active transfers and completed output in one place.
downloads.noDownloadsDesc: Start from Home by pasting a media URL and choosing your preferred format.
downloads.cancelAllActive: Cancel all active and paused downloads

history.description: Previously downloaded media and quick re-download shortcuts.
history.noHistoryDesc: Completed downloads will appear here. Start downloading to build your history!
history.historyDisabledDesc: Enable history in Settings to track your downloads.

system.title: Runtime Dependencies
system.description: Check whether required tools are installed and copy one-line install commands when something is missing.
system.missingWarning: Some required dependencies are missing. Downloads may fail until they are installed.
system.unavailable: Runtime dependency check is unavailable in this build.

info.upToDate: You're up to date on v{{version}}
info.updateAvailableDesc: A new version is available. Click Update to open the download page and install the latest version.
info.latestRelease: You're on the latest available release.
info.updateCheckUnavailable: Update check is unavailable in this build.
info.appDescription: AetherLens is built to help users save media they are authorized to keep, organize, and access offline. The app focuses on a reliable desktop workflow for metadata preview, quality selection, playlist handling, and resumable downloads.
info.aim1: Provide a clear and fast user experience for legitimate personal downloads.
info.aim2: Keep the desktop client stable across common video and playlist sources.
info.aim3: Expose practical controls: pause, resume, retry, format choice, and quality preference.
info.aim4: Improve transparency by showing metadata before users start a download.
info.legalText1: Users are responsible for complying with copyright law, local regulations, and each platform's terms of service. This software is not intended to bypass DRM, paywalls, or access controls.
info.legalText2: If you do not own the content or have explicit permission/license to download it, do not download it.
info.security1: The project should never ship with embedded API keys or private credentials.
info.security2: Browser cookie usage is optional and only for user-controlled authenticated access.
info.security3: Before publishing, always re-scan for secrets and keep build artifacts out of git.
info.disclaimer: This page is informational and not legal advice. For commercial or high-risk usage, consult a qualified legal professional.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize your download experience
settings.uiLanguageDesc: Change the display language of the application
settings.darkModeDesc: Toggle between dark and light theme
settings.turboDownloadDesc: Use concurrent fragments and optional aria2c multi-connection mode
settings.turboDownloadNote: Requires source support. For best speed, install aria2 and keep this enabled.
settings.turboModeDesc: Auto adjusts connections based on CPU and active downloads
settings.turboAutoExplanation: Auto is best for most users and prevents aggressive connection spikes during multiple downloads. Use Manual for stable high-bandwidth networks when you want fixed maximum speed for one download.
settings.turboConnectionsDesc: Higher values can improve speed but may increase throttling on some sites
settings.embedSubtitlesDesc: Automatically embed subtitles in downloaded videos
settings.embedSubtitlesNote: May not work for all sources. Subtitle tracks and auto-captions depend on site support.
settings.subtitleLanguagesNote: Language availability varies by source. Auto and original language can be inconsistent across sites.
settings.altAudioTracksDesc: Embed additional audio tracks in different languages
settings.altAudioTracksNote: Best effort only. Multi-audio extraction support depends on the source and extractor.
settings.preferredAudioLangNote: Best effort only. If language-specific streams are unavailable, default audio is used.
settings.keepThumbnailDesc: Best effort: download/embed website thumbnail; Windows Explorer previews may still vary
settings.keepThumbnailNote: Thumbnail embedding depends on media container, ffmpeg availability, and OS preview behavior.
settings.embedMediaTagsDesc: Include title, artist, thumbnail in downloaded files
settings.embedMediaTagsNote: Metadata embedding support varies by source format and container type.
settings.browserCookiesDesc: Use cookies from browser for private content access
settings.browserCookiesNote: Browser integration may fail depending on OS permissions, browser profile state, or site changes.
settings.cookieConnected: Connected! You can now download private and age-restricted content.
settings.cookieInvalid: Could not verify cookies. Make sure you're logged in to YouTube in the selected browser.
settings.cookieUnknown: Cookie check was inconclusive. Download may still work, but browser access could be limited.
settings.fileNameTemplateDesc: Customize how downloaded files are named
settings.desktopNotificationsDesc: Show system notifications when downloads complete or fail
settings.enableHistoryDesc: Keep track of your completed downloads
settings.disableHistoryConfirm:
Disable download history?

For privacy, existing history will be removed immediately.

setupWizard.languageStepDesc: Select your preferred language for the AetherLens interface.
setupWizard.runtimeDesc: AetherLens works best when required tools are available on your system. Install missing tools using the commands below.
setupWizard.missingWarning: Required tools are missing. Install them first for full functionality, or explicitly continue in limited mode.
setupWizard.limitedModeAck: I understand downloads may fail until required tools are installed.

whatsNew.title: What's New
whatsNew.description: This update focuses on first-run clarity, better recovery after failures, and easier update visibility.
whatsNew.feature1Desc: Required dependency checks are clearer, and limited mode now requires explicit confirmation.
whatsNew.feature2Desc: Failed jobs now expose Retry, Copy Details, and dependency-specific install guide actions.
whatsNew.feature3Desc: When a newer release exists, the Info section now shows a visible badge in the sidebar.

formatSelector.title: Choose Format
formatSelector.selectQuality: Select quality options for your download
formatSelector.turboOverride: Override global turbo settings only for this item.
formatSelector.mobileMeaning: means smoother playback on most phones.
formatSelector.bestAuto: Best quality will be selected automatically.
formatSelector.audioDesc: We'll extract the audio stream with the highest available bitrate.
formatSelector.photoDesc: Download the best thumbnail, or capture a screenshot when the URL includes a time.

searchModal.title: Search YouTube
searchModal.directUrlHint: For TikTok/Instagram, paste direct URLs on home page

playlistModal.title: Playlist Download
playlistModal.largePlaylistWarn: This playlist has {{count}} videos. Downloading all may take significant time and disk space.
